title: SDXL Img2Img Enhance Basic (Legacy — not true upscale)
note: This is an img2img detail enhancement workflow. It does NOT produce 2x/4x pixel upscaling. The output is resized back to selection dimensions. For true upscaling, see quality.upscale.2x and quality.upscale.4x (Phase 2).

defaults.prompt: enhance detail, clean texture, sharp but natural, preserve original structure
defaults.negativePrompt: over-sharpened, plastic skin, noisy, artifacts, changed identity, changed shape

sizePolicy.note: Output is resized to match selection dimensions exactly. This workflow is img2img enhance, NOT true upscale (2x/4x).

maskPolicy.note: Mask is optional for img2img enhance. If provided, it limits the enhancement area.
